introSection: Big Apple is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari currently located at Web Adventure Park in York, North Yorkshire, England, UK.

sections.title: History
sections.content: From 1996 until 2020, the coaster was situated at M&D's Scotland's Theme Park in Motherwell, Strathclyde, Scotland, UK.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a caterpillar.

fullText:
Big Apple is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari currently located at Web Adventure Park in York, North Yorkshire, England, UK.

From 1996 until 2020, the coaster was situated at M&D's Scotland's Theme Park in Motherwell, Strathclyde, Scotland, UK.



Yellow track and green supports.

The train is designed to resemble a caterpillar.
